title: Not to Be Unpleasant, But We Need to Have a Serious Talk
original_title: Δε θέλω να γίνω δυσάρεστος, αλλά πρέπει να μιλήσουμε για κάτι πολύ σοβαρό
overview: Womanizer Aris finds out he is a carrier of a sexually transmitted virus, lethal only for women. But he is also the only hope for a curing vaccine if he finds which one of his ex girlfriends had the first viral strain.
